case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. ALKA PATEL et al

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, ALKA
